description: Semantic WPF UI Navigation View Item block.

command.description: Binding expression for the command invoked when the item is activated.

commandParameter.description: Value passed to the bound command.

isActive.description: Whether the item is visually marked as the current destination.

isExpanded.description: Whether nested navigation items are expanded.

targetPageTag.description: Stable destination tag used by the application's navigation logic.

content.description: Visible label content for the navigation item.

icon.description: Optional symbol displayed beside the item label.

items.description: Nested navigation items shown when this item is expanded.
